text.zh: Stable Diffusion 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: Stable Diffusion is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: Stable Diffusion 通过在压缩潜空间中进行文本条件去噪生成图像，使潜扩散模型广泛流行。它的开放发布加速了创作工具、研究复用，也引发了关于生成媒体的讨论。
text.en: Stable Diffusion popularized latent diffusion by generating images through denoising in a compressed latent space conditioned on text. Its open release accelerated creative tools, research reuse, and debate about generative media.
